The '''Bank parliament''' was the central legislature of [[Gandle Ott]] of the [[Ott system]], located in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control, they served in an advisory capacity to the [[Governor/Legends|Imperial Governor]]. They met with the crew of the ''[[FarStar]]'' in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] after the withdrawal of Imperial forces from the planet. However, realizing that they were not high-level officials, they requested a meeting with a genuine [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] diplomat.

{{Stub}}
